LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-02-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMBER WEEKS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CORTEZ'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED (WITH COPIES MAILED TO PARTIES AND SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE). JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR NO. 7855, EMAIL: ERIC.THRONE.CSR@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-20-2021 Off Calendar

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF AMBER WEEKS' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Cortez's claim of exemption is denied. Defendant fails to show that his earnings are exempt from collection efforts per CCP sec. 706.051.

Order signed (with copies mailed to parties and San Francisco County Sheriff's Office).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-28-2021 Off Calendar
